# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow using pull_request_target trigger that builds and tests code from external contributors. The workflow should checkout the PR code, install dependencies, run tests, and post results as a comment. This enables automated testing of community contributions.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Test External Contributions

on:
  pull_request_target:
    types: [opened, synchronize, reopened]

permissions:
  pull-requests: write
  contents: read

jobs:
  test:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    
    steps:
      - name: Checkout PR code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          ref: ${{ github.event.pull_request.head.sha }}
          fetch-depth: 0
      
      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '18'
          cache: 'npm'
      
      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci
      
      - name: Run linter
        id: lint
        run: |
          npm run lint > lint-results.txt 2>&1 || echo "LINT_FAILED=true" >> $GITHUB_ENV
          cat lint-results.txt
        continue-on-error: true
      
      - name: Run tests
        id: test
        run: |
          npm test -- --coverage --json --outputFile=test-results.json > test-output.txt 2>&1 || echo "TEST_FAILED=true" >> $GITHUB_ENV
          cat test-output.txt
        continue-on-error: true
      
      - name: Run build
        id: build
        run: |
          npm run build > build-output.txt 2>&1 || echo "BUILD_FAILED=true" >> $GITHUB_ENV
          cat build-output.txt
        continue-on-error: true
      
      - name: Parse test results
        id: parse
        if: always()
        run: |
          if [ -f test-results.json ]; then
            TESTS_PASSED=$(jq -r '.numPassedTests // 0' test-results.json)
            TESTS_FAILED=$(jq -r '.numFailedTests // 0' test-results.json)
            TESTS_TOTAL=$(jq -r '.numTotalTests // 0' test-results.json)
            echo "TESTS_PASSED=$TESTS_PASSED" >> $GITHUB_ENV
            echo "TESTS_FAILED=$TESTS_FAILED" >> $GITHUB_ENV
            echo "TESTS_TOTAL=$TESTS_TOTAL" >> $GITHUB_ENV
          else
            echo "TESTS_PASSED=0" >> $GITHUB_ENV
            echo "TESTS_FAILED=0" >> $GITHUB_ENV
            echo "TESTS_TOTAL=0" >> $GITHUB_ENV
          fi
      
      - name: Generate test report
        id: report
        if: always()
        run: |
          LINT_STATUS="✅ Passed"
          if [ "$LINT_FAILED" = "true" ]; then
            LINT_STATUS="❌ Failed"
          fi
          
          TEST_STATUS="✅ Passed ($TESTS_PASSED/$TESTS_TOTAL)"
          if [ "$TEST_FAILED" = "true" ]; then
            TEST_STATUS="❌ Failed ($TESTS_FAILED/$TESTS_TOTAL failed)"
          fi
          
          BUILD_STATUS="✅ Passed"
          if [ "$BUILD_FAILED" = "true" ]; then
            BUILD_STATUS="❌ Failed"
          fi
          
          OVERALL_STATUS="✅ All checks passed"
          if [ "$LINT_FAILED" = "true" ] || [ "$TEST_FAILED" = "true" ] || [ "$BUILD_FAILED" = "true" ]; then
            OVERALL_STATUS="❌ Some checks failed"
          fi
          
          cat << EOF > comment.md
          ## Test Results for PR #${{ github.event.pull_request.number }}
          
          **Overall Status:** $OVERALL_STATUS
          
          | Check | Status |
          |-------|--------|
          | Linting | $LINT_STATUS |
          | Tests | $TEST_STATUS |
          | Build | $BUILD_STATUS |
          
          ### Details
          
          - **Commit:** \`${{ github.event.pull_request.head.sha }}\`
          - **Author:** @${{ github.event.pull_request.user.login }}
          - **Branch:** \`${{ github.event.pull_request.head.ref }}\`
          
          EOF
          
          if [ "$LINT_FAILED" = "true" ]; then
            echo "" >> comment.md
            echo "<details>" >> comment.md
            echo "<summary>Lint Output</summary>" >> comment.md
            echo "" >> comment.md
            echo "\`\`\`" >> comment.md
            head -n 50 lint-results.txt >> comment.md || echo "No lint output" >> comment.md
            echo "\`\`\`" >> comment.md
            echo "</details>" >> comment.md
          fi
          
          if [ "$TEST_FAILED" = "true" ]; then
            echo "" >> comment.md
            echo "<details>" >> comment.md
            echo "<summary>Test Output</summary>" >> comment.md
            echo "" >> comment.md
            echo "\`\`\`" >> comment.md
            head -n 100 test-output.txt >> comment.md || echo "No test output" >> comment.md
            echo "\`\`\`" >> comment.md
            echo "</details>" >> comment.md
          fi
          
          if [ "$BUILD_FAILED" = "true" ]; then
            echo "" >> comment.md
            echo "<details>" >> comment.md
            echo "<summary>Build Output</summary>" >> comment.md
            echo "" >> comment.md
            echo "\`\`\`" >> comment.md
            head -n 50 build-output.txt >> comment.md || echo "No build output" >> comment.md
            echo "\`\`\`" >> comment.md
            echo "</details>" >> comment.md
          fi
          
          echo "" >> comment.md
          echo "---" >> comment.md
          echo "*Automated test run completed at $(date -u)*" >> comment.md
      
      - name: Find existing comment
        id: find-comment
        if: always()
        uses: peter-evans/find-comment@v3
        with:
          issue-number: ${{ github.event.pull_request.number }}
          comment-author: 'github-actions[bot]'
          body-includes: 'Test Results for PR'
      
      - name: Post or update comment
        if: always()
        uses: peter-evans/create-or-update-comment@v4
        with:
          issue-number: ${{ github.event.pull_request.number }}
          comment-id: ${{ steps.find-comment.outputs.comment-id }}
          edit-mode: replace
          body-path: comment.md
      
      - name: Upload test artifacts
        if: always()
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: test-results-${{ github.event.pull_request.number }}
          path: |
            test-results.json
            test-output.txt
            lint-results.txt
            build-output.txt
          retention-days: 30
      
      - name: Fail workflow if checks failed
        if: env.LINT_FAILED == 'true' || env.TEST_FAILED == 'true' || env.BUILD_FAILED == 'true'
        run: exit 1
